name: Please Come Back, Mister
overview: The story follows two men who die but return to the living world in different, attractive bodies for a limited time to fix their mistakes and find love. It is based on the novel Mr. Tsubakiyama's Seven Days by Jirō Asada.

trailers.title: TRAILER TẬP 1 - CHỈ YÊU MÌNH EM ( I ONLY LOVE YOU )
